title: Translate should fall back safely when source shape changes
why_this_case_exists: When source structure changes too much for clean block reuse, the command should still be understandable and safe rather than silently mixing old and new content.
setup: The repository is a Git repo.
The source document has structural edits such as merged or split sections.
The existing target document no longer matches the new source block shape.

input.after_shape: heading -> paragraph -> paragraph -> list -> note block

expected: The command still produces valid Markdown.
The fallback behavior is understandable from output or debug artifacts.
Protected terms and code are still preserved.
should_not_happen: Old and new structure are mixed incoherently.
Large sections are silently rewritten with obvious regressions.
